description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have multiple jobs for different environments: linux, macos, and wasm. For linux, run on a matrix of debian and ubuntu targets, setting up dependencies and running make commands. For macos, run on a matrix of macos targets, setting up dependencies and running make commands. For wasm, run on ubuntu-22.04, setting up emscripten and running make commands.
